## **2.2.2.A. PI #1**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

No new initiatives. For 2024 the performance was 2,76 %. NSA will continously monitor this on a yearly basis, if there are no indications this PI will detoriate. The PI is still affected by flight planning around Russian/Kaliningrad airspace. Outcome in line with previous years.
